---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Why does it matter?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples that help illustrate the request.
